AddressInfo.Title: Avetra Skobelka
AddressInfo.AccessComments:
To charge, you need to install the "GO TO-U" mobile application

iOS: https://apps.apple.com/ua/app/to-u/id1175538017
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.go.tou

Then, select a charging station on the map and reserve it for the required time. When you arrive at the location, insert the cable into charger and into the car, click "Start charging" in the app. More detailed information - in the "About our service" section of the GO TO-U app. More GO TO-U charging stations are displayed exclusively in the mobile application. You must have your own cable to charge!
Support - 0 800 217 007
